string.text:
"Aquabreeze" tablets are intended for disinfecting drinking water containing bacteria and viruses. They are typically used for transporting and storing drinking water in field and extreme conditions, as well as in emergency situations when drawing water from non-centralized sources (rivers, lakes, ponds, etc.). Water disinfection should only be carried out in a container with a screw-on lid (flask, etc.). The package contains 10 tablets, and it is recommended to use them at a rate of 2 tablets per 1 liter of water. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]CHARACTERISTICS:
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] slow use (soluble tablets)
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] disinfecting drinking water
